spec_match.rationale: Shows excellent integration of light-dark() inside border-image, mapping classes on the root to toggle the color-scheme CSS property.

interactive.rationale: Straightforward interactive buttons to toggle color-scheme natively in CSS with immediate feedback.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Parent blurb matches the border image swap concept perfectly.

edge_cases.rationale: Demonstrates four excellent border-image patterns: stripes, dots, gradients, and the conditional 'none' value in dark mode.

references.rationale: The page completely lacks the mandatory ChromeStatus reference link in its see also section.

design_system.rationale: Adheres to design system rules using standard borders, typography, and card grids.

openQuestions.title: Add ChromeStatus reference link
openQuestions.detail: The page is missing the required reference link to `https://chromestatus.com/feature/5123253146353664`. It should be added to the 'see also' section to conform to the repository rules.

summary: An excellent and thorough concept demo showing four distinct border-image properties using light-dark(), including the 'none' fallback. Interactivity is high-quality, but the page fails the repository rules by missing the mandatory ChromeStatus reference link.
